rationale.R1.1: Identified the key conceptual issue with CMDP underperforming on commitment and reframed it as a paradox, providing a clear and tighter framing.
rationale.R1.2: Walked through the argument chain end-to-end, identified load-bearing inconsistencies, and proposed minimal repairs by making the paradox explicit.
rationale.R1.3: Audited every load-bearing claim against corresponding evidence from Table 1 and other data points in the text.
rationale.R1.6: Performed a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register and no lost meaning, improving clarity and flow significantly.
rationale.RX.1: Flagged uncertainty regarding Table 1 reference and 137s figure but did not mark confidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d) without any scope drift.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identified harmful patterns in the original draft related to logical consistency and framing.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced but minor edits are not annotated with source and reason.
